name: Guard Captain
description: Commands the local watch. The weight of every crime, threat, and staffing decision sits on their shoulders.
dialogue_hooks: asking pointed questions about your business in town
recruiting help for a problem that's beyond the watch's ability
sharing concern about rising crime or border tensions
disagreeing with a lord's priorities for defense spending
requesting discretion about a sensitive matter
voice_patterns: clipped and commanding — expects to be obeyed
tired authority — the job has worn them down
old soldier — treats you with respect if you've earned it

schedule.evening: patrol or at the watch house
schedule.night: on call — sleeps light at the barracks
